heroSubtitle: We're here to help and answer any questions you might have. We look forward to hearing from you!

form.title: Send us a Message
form.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.
form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll respond within 24 hours.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions

items.question: How quickly can I expect a response?
items.answer: We typically respond within 2-4 business hours during working days.

items.question: Do you provide technical support for recruiters?
items.answer: Yes, our dedicated support team is available to help recruiters with any technical issues.

items.question: Can I schedule a demo of the platform?
items.answer: Absolutely! Contact our sales team to schedule a personalized demo.

items.question: What are your support hours?
items.answer: Our support team is available Monday-Friday, 9 AM to 8 PM IST.

support.title: Need Immediate Assistance?
support.subtitle: Our support team is available 24/7 to help you with any urgent issues or questions.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to Our Newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Get the latest updates on jobs and industry news
